roadmap.goal: Desktop-web-specific UX improvements: keyboard flow (autofocus, Enter key) and pencil edit icon replacing long-press

steps.name: useIsWeb hook and QuickAdd autofocus on web
steps.description: Replace useIsWeb RED scaffold with Platform.OS === 'web' implementation. Wire autoFocus={isWeb} on QuickAdd's TextInput.
criteria: useIsWeb() returns true on web, false on iOS/Android
QuickAdd TextInput has autoFocus=true on web
QuickAdd TextInput does not autofocus on mobile

steps.name: Enter key submits QuickAdd input and metadata sheet
steps.description: Add onSubmitEditing to QuickAdd TextInput so Enter opens the metadata sheet with the typed name. Add onSubmitEditing to the last input in MetadataBottomSheet (Aisle number) so Enter submits the form.
criteria: Enter key in QuickAdd with non-empty text opens metadata sheet
Enter key in QuickAdd with empty text is a no-op
Enter key on Aisle number input in MetadataBottomSheet submits the form
deliverables: onSubmitEditing handlers on QuickAdd and metadata sheet

steps.name: Autofocus Store section input when metadata sheet opens on web
steps.description: When MetadataBottomSheet becomes visible AND running on web, the Store section TextInput gets autoFocus so the user can type immediately after Enter opens the sheet.
criteria: Store section input has autoFocus=true when sheet opens on web
Store section input does NOT autofocus on mobile
deliverables: Conditional autoFocus on Store section TextInput

steps.name: Pencil edit icon on web rows replaces long-press
steps.description: In TripItemRow and StapleChecklist's StapleRow, render a Pressable pencil icon (testID edit-button-{name}) when useIsWeb() is true and an edit callback is provided. Icon press invokes the existing onLongPress callback. Mobile rows retain long-press with no pencil icon.
criteria: Pencil edit button visible on TripItemRow when on web and onLongPress is provided
Pencil edit button NOT rendered on mobile
Tapping pencil icon triggers the edit sheet
Pencil edit button visible on StapleChecklist rows on web
deliverables: Conditional pencil edit button on rows
